decisions.briefing: Markets dipped modestly today with NASDAQ -0.7% and S&P 500 -0.4%, a neutral-to-soft session without a clear directional catalyst. Cash sits at $477 — just below the $500 threshold that would require aggressively filling open slots — so no new entries are initiated. All six existing positions remain intact with INOD still appearing on the screener at score 90, reinforcing the existing hold.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities pulled back modestly on Monday, with the tech-heavy NASDAQ leading declines at -0.7% while the broader S&P 500 fell -0.4%. The mild selloff reflects a risk-off tone as investors digested mixed macro signals heading into the back half of June, with no single dominant catalyst driving the move. Rate sensitivity and sector rotation out of high-momentum names pressured growth stocks more than value, consistent with the neutral market designation.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週一小幅回落，以科技股為主的納斯達克指數跌0.7%，標普500指數跌0.4%，整體呈現中性偏弱格局。市場在六月下旬缺乏明確催化劑的情況下，投資者情緒趨於謹慎，呈現輕微避險傾向。利率敏感性與資金從高動能成長股輪動至防禦性板塊，令科技類股承壓幅度大於價值型股票，與當日中性市況的定性相符。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag refers to the opportunity cost of holding uninvested cash in a portfolio — idle cash earns little while the market moves. Today's portfolio has $477 sitting unused, just under the $500 action threshold. While holding some cash provides flexibility and safety during uncertain markets, too much idle cash over time will cause the portfolio to underperform a fully-invested benchmark like VOO.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」（Cash Drag）是指投資組合中持有未投入現金所產生的機會成本。閒置現金幾乎不產生回報，而市場卻持續波動。本日組合有477美元尚未部署，略低於500美元的行動門檻。適度持有現金可在不確定市況下提供靈活性與安全緩衝，但若長期閒置過多現金，組合表現將落後於VOO等全額投入的基準指數。
